title: [codereview-P4] packet_info payload_buf size limited to TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX but unsupported packets may exceed
description: After adding payload_buf[LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX] in adapter.h:102, parse_data:771 will truncate or ignore larger payloads. For unsupported or admin, may lose data. Should use MIN(payload_len, sizeof(payload_buf)) and document. P4 as real work per instructions. Tag: codereview
